Vendored third-party assets
===========================

These files are checked in so the static page does not depend on RawGit,
jsDelivr, d3js.org, or Google Fonts being available at runtime.

- `d3.v4.min.js`: D3 4.13.0, downloaded from
  `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@4.13.0/build/d3.min.js`
- `normalize.css`: normalize.css 8.0.1, downloaded from
  `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/normalize.css@8.0.1/normalize.css`
- `milligram.min.css`: Milligram 1.4.1, downloaded from
  `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/milligram@1.4.1/dist/milligram.min.css`

Licenses are included in `LICENSES.md`.
